channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Kennedy Center board seeks pause of ruling ordering removal of Trump's name
item.description: President Trump's board at the Kennedy Center is mounting a last-minute effort to keep his name on the facade of the performing arts facility before a court-ordered deadline to remove it by Friday.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump's board at the Kennedy Center is mounting a last-minute effort to keep his name on the facade of the performing arts facility before a court-ordered deadline to remove it by Friday.

(Image credit: Rod Lamkey)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: President Trump is taking aim at forest and wildfire research just as the West is poised to burn
item.description: President Trump is trying to downsize the U.S Forest Service and eliminate wildfire and smoke research as the American West is facing a potentially epic summer fire season.
item.content:encoded: President Trump is trying to downsize the U.S Forest Service and eliminate wildfire and smoke research as the American West is facing a potentially epic summer fire season.
item.dc:creator: Kirk Siegler

item.title: Supreme Court prohibits Alabama from using nitrogen gas for execution
item.description: Because of the ruling, Jeffrey Lee's execution will be delayed. He still faces the death penalty.
item.content:encoded:
Because of the ruling, Jeffrey Lee's execution will be delayed. He still faces the death penalty.

(Image credit: Tasos Katopodis)
item.dc:creator: Grady Martin

item.title: Advice on going back to work after parental leave
item.description: Heading back to work after parental leave? Life Kit has some advice on navigating schedules, managing expectations and finding support during a major life transition.
item.content:encoded: Heading back to work after parental leave? Life Kit has some advice on navigating schedules, managing expectations and finding support during a major life transition.
item.dc:creator: Andee Tagle

item.title: A decade after the Pulse nightclub massacre, grief is still raw in Orlando
item.description: It's been 10 years since the mass shooting at the Pulse nightclub in Orlando. Grief for the 49 young people who died is still felt throughout the community.
item.content:encoded: It's been 10 years since the mass shooting at the Pulse nightclub in Orlando. Grief for the 49 young people who died is still felt throughout the community.
item.dc:creator: Joe M Pedersen

item.title: A fuzzy little detective is helping police in Florida: Meet Splash the otter
item.description: Otters can be trained to do search and rescue in murky waters. In Florida, law enforcement is now using one of them.
item.content:encoded: Otters can be trained to do search and rescue in murky waters. In Florida, law enforcement is now using one of them.
item.dc:creator: Cathleen Carter

item.title: Socioeconomic factors are becoming 'biologically embedded' in children's brains
item.description: A study of more than 2,300 9- to 10-year-olds found that socioeconomic factors explained most differences in the preteens' brain development.
item.content:encoded:
A study of more than 2,300 9- to 10-year-olds found that socioeconomic factors explained most differences in the preteens' brain development.

(Image credit: Andriy Onufriyenko)
item.dc:creator: Jon Hamilton

item.title: World Cup facts and figures to get you sounding like an expert
item.description: With a record 48 teams and 1,248 players, there's an endless number of stats about the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Here are a few to get you started.
item.content:encoded:
With a record 48 teams and 1,248 players, there's an endless number of stats about the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Here are a few to get you started.

(Image credit: Patricia De Melo Moreira)
item.dc:creator: Juliana Kim

item.title: N.Y. and N.J. are hosting the World Cup. The real party is along the 7 train
item.description: The 2026 World Cup is being played in New Jersey, but in Queens, New York, home to immigrants from all over the world, soccer is not just a sport. It's a way of life.
item.content:encoded:
The 2026 World Cup is being played in New Jersey, but in Queens, New York, home to immigrants from all over the world, soccer is not just a sport. It's a way of life.

(Image credit: José A. Alvarado Jr. for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Jasmine Garsd

item.title: Knicks rally from 29 points down and beat Spurs for 3-1 NBA Finals lead
item.description: The New York Knicks made a record comeback from 29 points down and moved to the brink of their first championship since 1973 by beating the San Antonio Spurs 107-106 on Wednesday night.
item.content:encoded:
The New York Knicks made a record comeback from 29 points down and moved to the brink of their first championship since 1973 by beating the San Antonio Spurs 107-106 on Wednesday night.

(Image credit: Ross D. Franklin)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
